## What kind of change
- [ ] New blog post
- [ ] New industry landing page (`/for/...`)
- [ ] Copy edit on an existing page
- [ ] New schema / structured data
- [ ] Other SEO/GEO improvement

## Page / target
<!-- URL or filepath, or "new page about X" -->

## Proposed change
<!-- Draft copy, schema, or description of what should happen -->

## Why this matters
<!-- Search query, customer feedback, brand alignment, conversion fix, etc. -->

## SEO checks (if applicable)
- [ ] Title ≤ 60 chars: `<title>...`
- [ ] Description ≤ 160 chars: `<meta name="description">...`
- [ ] Canonical URL is correct
- [ ] Added to `sitemap.xml`
- [ ] Linked from the homepage's `seo-content` nav block (if a new page)
